How Ownly works

Every action earns.
Every remix earns forever.

Unlike every other social platform, Ownly pays you not advertisers for the attention you generate.

01
❤️

Engage and earn points

Like, comment or share posts funded by a Creator Pool and earn real reward points straight to your wallet. The more you engage genuinely, the more you earn.

Like = +1 pt Comment = +3 pts Share = +2 pts
02
🚀

Creators fund reach, earn it back

Creators deposit points into their Creator Pool to fund engagement rewards on their posts. Every like, comment and share also earns the creator points back into their pool.

Like received = +2 pts Comment = +4 pts Share = +3 pts
03
🔁

Pay to remix, earn from the chain forever

Pay a dynamic price to join the remix chain of any post. Once in the chain, every future paid remix distributes royalties to ALL chain members automatically.

Dynamic remix price Pool royalties Earn forever
04
📈

Points convert to real money

Every point is backed by a real INR Reserve. At withdrawal, points multiply by today dynamic pool rate and your quality score. Withdraw via UPI directly to your bank.

Dynamic rate daily Quality score bonus UPI withdrawal

The remix royalty chain

Your content keeps
earning after you sleep.

Patent-pending technology that tracks every remix in your content lineage and automatically distributes royalties to every creator in the chain including you.

You post original content
Sarah pays to remix it. You both earn instantly.
Jordan remixes Sarah remix. All three earn from every new remix.
The chain grows. Every member earns from every future paid remix forever.

Every engagement earns you points
Funded by the Creator Pool. Points convert to real money via dynamic daily rate.

For brands

Your campaign does not
end at post. It compounds.

When creators on Ownly remix your sponsored content, your brand earns royalties back turning every campaign into a compounding asset.

Remix amplification

Sponsored posts get remixed by other creators. Your brand message spreads organically through authentic voices, not paid reach.

Coming soon

Royalty return

Every remix of your campaign content generates royalties back to your brand. The more creative the community, the more you earn back.

Coming soon

Creator partnerships

Connect directly with verified creators in our network. Transparent deal flow, clear deliverables, measurable ROI.
